items.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 5.7M, Depth:59.087km) in Japan 02/05/2026 09:28 UTC, 140 thousand in MMI V.

items.title: Green flood alert in Tajikistan
items.body: On 01/05/2026, a flood started in Tajikistan, lasting until 03/05/2026 (last update). The flood caused 3 deaths and 500 displaced .

items.title: Volcanic eruption is on going for Mayon in Philippines
items.body: Volcano Mayon is emitting ash clouds according to the regional VAAC. The aviation alert level is Green.
